overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character moves from an outer courtyard with an obelisk and sphinx statues through hieroglyph-covered gates into an inner columned sanctum with ceremonial debris scattered on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer temple courtyard with obelisk and sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the outer temple courtyard toward the main entrance, passing between large sphinx statues

notable_agents.action: priest in white and leopard-skin robes walking ahead toward the temple

entered.detail: tall dark granite obelisk with golden hieroglyphic inscriptions near the base
massive stone temple entrance with tall columns and decorative lintel
large recumbent stone sphinx statue flanking the approach
large recumbent stone sphinx statue flanking the approach
palm tree in a large ornate planter with gold and black patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit outer courtyard approaching an ancient Egyptian temple. A tall obelisk stands to the left while sphinx statues flank the path ahead. The temple facade rises in the distance, and a priest in ceremonial robes walks ahead of the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple gate passage with hieroglyph-covered walls

events.description: character passes between the sphinx statues and enters the decorated temple gate
character begins ascending the wide stone staircase through the gate

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs through the temple gate, passing between burning braziers

notable_agents.action: temple guardian standing at the top of the stairs observing the approach

entered.detail: tall stone walls covered in colorful Egyptian hieroglyphs and relief carvings
tall bronze brazier with bright flames on a decorated pedestal
wide stone stairs leading upward through the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple gate, passing between massive walls covered in hieroglyphs. Burning braziers flank the entrance as the character ascends the stone stairs. The temple guardian stands at the top watching the approach, and the outer courtyard elements disappear from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple courtyard with columns and ceremonial carpets

events.description: character enters the inner courtyard with tall columns and scattered ceremonial debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the inner sanctum, observing the columns and ceremonial remains on the ground

entered.detail: massive stone columns with intricate hieroglyphic carvings supporting the roof
red and gold patterned carpet covering the stone floor with frayed edges
large ceramic urn with green and gold geometric patterns
white and red fabric canopy hanging between columns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the inner temple courtyard, a covered area with massive hieroglyph-covered columns. Red ceremonial carpets line the floor, scattered with flower petals and debris. Large decorated urns and fabric awnings decorate the space as the character moves deeper into the sanctum.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow exit corridor with hieroglyph walls

events.description: character exits the inner courtyard through a narrow passage with hieroglyph-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow exit corridor toward the bright outdoor light visible at the end

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes walking ahead through the exit gateway

entered.detail: tight stone walls covered in detailed hieroglyphic reliefs and carvings
bright opening at the end of the corridor leading back outside
palm trees visible through the exit against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the inner courtyard through a narrow corridor with walls covered in hieroglyphs. The space becomes enclosed and darker, with bright daylight visible through the exit gateway ahead. A figure walks ahead toward the outside where palm trees are visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open Egyptian courtyard into the shadowed depths of a temple before emerging back into the daylight. It begins in a sunlit plaza, passing a tall obelisk and sphinx statues while following a priest toward the temple facade. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts through a gateway of massive hieroglyph-covered walls and burning braziers, ascending stone stairs past a temple guardian. The environment then opens into a covered inner sanctum characterized by towering columns, red ceremonial carpets scattered with petals, and decorated urns. Finally, the camera pushes through a narrow, darkening corridor of inscriptions before exiting toward a bright gateway where palm trees are visible in the distance.
